scope: FQ-09U3: event stingers over temporary Music-bus ducking, a runtime audio-settings authority (music/SFX volume), director pause behavior, and final stinger-asset validation - the horizontal+vertical adaptive score (U1/U2) now also reacts to discrete events. Co-committed with the concurrent Codex art integration that shared the working tree.
summary: Remote-control resume of interrupted work. The reset left FQ-09U3 one check short: fq09u3_events_fire_stingers expected two stingers from two game events (music_event(nightfall) + the player's attunement_pulsed) but got one. Root cause: the AdaptiveMusicDirector wired attunement_pulsed inside _ready, which - being a child of Main - fires before game_root's @onready var player is assigned, so root.player was null and _wire_events skipped the connection; music_event survived because it targets a script-level signal. Fix: _wire_events.call_deferred() defers wiring past the _ready cascade to when the player is live (256 -> 257). U3 as shipped: play_stinger drives SFX-bus one-shots while a per-frame envelope ducks the Music bus underneath (the music is only lowered, never stopped); per-kind cooldowns from stinger_config stop event spam; the duck attacks fast and releases slow toward duck_db. AudioSettings.apply(profile[, duck_db]) is the one place that creates the Music/SFX buses and sets volumes from profile-level music_volume/sfx_volume linear keys, folding the transient duck into the Music bus - volume is a profile preference, never a world-save key. process_mode = ALWAYS keeps the score breathing and the envelope ticking under pause. validate_repo.py now requires the five stinger OGGs and the verifier confirms durations/sample-rate/headroom (operator listening approval was granted 2026-07-10). The Codex art lane (independently verified: 55 PNGs plus player_visual.gd/player_visuals.json 16x32 bodies with constrained recolor and gear hooks, PlayerVisual in Player.tscn, Town Hall + backdrop art with nearest filtering) shared the dirty tree; three files carry hunks from both lanes, so U3 and art committed together per operator decision. Nothing pushed.
acceptance: Five stinger kinds load as short non-looping one-shots; director reports all five (fq09u3_stinger_assets)
A fired stinger ducks the Music bus below -3 dB while the context loop keeps playing (fq09u3_stinger_ducks_music)
The duck envelope releases back toward 0 dB after the stinger ends (fq09u3_duck_releases)
Per-kind cooldowns block a repeat, allow a different kind, and re-allow after cooldown (fq09u3_stinger_cooldown)
Game events reach the director: music_event(nightfall) + attunement_pulsed each fire a stinger - the deferred-wiring fix (fq09u3_events_fire_stingers)
Music/SFX volume settings apply to the runtime buses and round-trip (fq09u3_volume_settings)
World save carries zero music/volume/stinger keys (fq09u3_world_save_clean)
Suite 257/257; validator, capsule doctor, git diff --check green
validation: python scripts/validate_repo.py -> PASS (exit 0) incl. five stinger OGGs + all Codex art contracts
COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 waited headless run -> 257/257 PASS at 2026-07-13T13:32:02 (isolated temp APPDATA)
git diff --check -> only expected LF->CRLF notices
decisions: Root-caused the failing check to _ready ordering vs an @onready parent var; fixed with call_deferred rather than restructuring signal ownership - the narrowest in-lane change
Committed U3 and the Codex art integration together: the shared smoke_test.gd/validate_repo.py/player.gd hunks made a clean per-lane split impossible (operator-chosen)
Did not push - the remote-control decision specified push only on explicit instruction
Stinger on the SFX bus with the duck on the Music bus, so the bed dips under the stinger and the stinger itself is never attenuated
Volume is a profile-level preference (AudioSettings authority), deliberately kept out of world saves
risks: Stinger/duck FEEL (depth, attack/release, cooldown) is play-tunable in stinger_config; needs an ear pass during play
The combined commit ties U3 and art history together; reverting one would need path-level surgery
No new art screenshots this resume (audio-only change); art rests on Codex's prior verified rendered QA
Local main is two commits ahead of origin; nothing pushed
next_action: FQ-10: more ores and metallurgy data. Art backlog via docs/ASSET_ROADMAP.md + docs/HANDOFF_ART_INTEGRATION_2026-07-12.md.
